meta.description: Lightweight PDF text extraction desktop app with Svelte + Tauri

tasks.title: Implement text extraction flow (frontend ↔ sidecar ↔ backend)
Set up design foundation: fonts, CSS variables, and theme tokens
tasks.description: Replace the current color/font system with the Ink & Paper design tokens. Load Cormorant Garamond (display), DM Sans (body/UI), JetBrains Mono (extracted text) via Google Fonts or local bundles. Define all CSS custom properties for light/dark themes. Add paper grain noise texture (SVG filter, opacity 0.03). Set up custom scrollbar styles (6px, accent thumb). Add prefers-reduced-motion media query foundation.
subtasks: Add Google Fonts link or @font-face for Cormorant Garamond, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono
Replace all CSS variables in :root with new light theme tokens
Replace all dark theme CSS variables in prefers-color-scheme: dark
Create SVG noise texture overlay for paper grain effect
Style custom scrollbar (::-webkit-scrollbar) — thin, accent-colored
Add prefers-reduced-motion: reduce media query with fallback styles

tasks.title: Redesign layout: split-panel with vertical sidebar
tasks.description: Replace the current full-width stacked layout with a split-panel design. Add a fixed-width sidebar (52px) on the left with app icon, vertical stats, and icon-only navigation. The sidebar should have a dark tone regardless of theme (for contrast). Compact title bar replaces the large header. Responsive: collapse sidebar to 36px icon-strip at 600-799px, hide below 600px.
subtasks: Create Sidebar.svelte component with app icon SVG, vertical stats, and icon buttons
Redesign App.svelte grid: sidebar (fixed) + main content (flex)
Create compact TitleBar.svelte: file name (truncated) + status badge (pill, color-coded)
Move stats from horizontal grid to sidebar vertical list with small-caps labels
Add status badge with pulse animation when extracting
Add responsive breakpoints: 800px (full), 600-799px (icon-strip), <600px (hidden)

tasks.title: Redesign drop zone with editorial style
tasks.description: Replace the current generic drop zone with the Ink & Paper editorial design. Large Cormorant Garamond serif heading ('Drop your PDF'). Stylized PDF icon in monochrome SVG (document with folded corner, 64px). Custom dashed border with SVG stroke-dasharray pattern. Animated border: slow dash rotation on idle, accent color + icon scale-up on drag-over.
subtasks: Create PDF document SVG icon (monochrome, folded corner, 64px)
Restyle drop zone panel: Cormorant Garamond heading, DM Sans subtitle
Implement custom dashed border via SVG (stroke-dasharray animated)
Add idle animation: slow stroke-dashoffset rotation
Add drag-over state: accent border, icon scale-up, background shift
Restyle the Choose PDF button: pill shape with accent fill

tasks.title: Redesign text viewer with page cards and ruled lines
tasks.description: Replace the current plain text display with editorial page cards. Each page card gets: cream paper-texture background, faint ruled horizontal lines (repeating-linear-gradient matched to line-height), subtle box-shadow, top-left corner fold effect (CSS triangle), and a folio-style page number in the top-right. Use JetBrains Mono for extracted text. Add page-load stagger animation (slide-up + fade-in, delay: index * 60ms).
subtasks: Restyle .page cards: cream bg, subtle shadow, rounded 12px
Add ruled lines via repeating-linear-gradient (match JetBrains Mono line-height)
Create CSS corner fold effect (::before triangle in top-left corner)
Move page number to top-right folio style (editorial, small-caps)
Implement staggered page entrance animation (slide-up + fade, 60ms delay per page)
Add page card hover: subtle lift (translateY -2px) + shadow increase
Set JetBrains Mono as font for pre elements

tasks.title: Redesign status bar, action buttons, and toast notifications
tasks.description: Replace the current footer with a compact 48px status bar. Left side: status text + ink-line progress indicator (horizontal gradient that grows during extraction, like ink spreading). Right side: 'Copy All' (outline style) + 'Save TXT' (filled accent). Buttons: press-down micro-interaction on :active (translateY 1px). Redesign toast: rounded 12px, left color-band (4px), auto-dismiss with visible countdown bar (shrinking width animation).
subtasks: Restyle footer to compact 48px status bar
Replace spinner with ink-line progress: horizontal bar with shimmer gradient
Restyle Copy All button: outline style, pill shape
Restyle Save TXT button: filled accent, pill shape
Add :active micro-interaction: translateY(1px) + darker bg on press
Redesign toast: rounded 12px, left color-band, slide-in with bounce easing
Add toast countdown bar: shrinking width over 3 seconds before dismiss

tasks.title: Redesign error states and accessibility polish
tasks.description: Restyle error banner: full-width below title bar, 4px vermillion left border, cream bg, icon + message + dismiss button. Not a modal. Add keyboard navigation focus rings (2px offset accent outline). Ensure WCAG AA contrast for all text/bg combos in both themes. Add aria-labels for icon-only sidebar buttons. Respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable stagger animations, use opacity-only transitions.
subtasks: Restyle error alert: left border accent, icon, dismiss button
Add focus-visible ring styles (2px offset, accent color)
Verify WCAG AA contrast ratios in both light and dark themes
Add aria-label to all icon-only buttons in sidebar
Implement prefers-reduced-motion: disable stagger, simplify transitions
Test keyboard-only navigation flow through all interactive elements

tasks.title: Integration test and visual QA of new UI
tasks.description: Full visual QA pass: verify all components render correctly in both light and dark themes. Test all animations (stagger, ink-line, toast countdown, drop zone border rotation). Test responsive breakpoints (800px, 600px, min-size). Verify the complete user flow: drop/pick PDF → extraction with ink-line progress → page cards appear with stagger → copy/save with toast feedback. Fix any visual regressions.
subtasks: Visual QA: light theme — all components, all states
Visual QA: dark theme — all components, all states
Test responsive: full (800+), compact (600-799), narrow (<600)
Test full user flow: file pick → extract → view → copy → save
Test animations: stagger, ink-line, toast countdown, drop zone
Test error states: encrypted PDF, image-only PDF, corrupt file
Fix any visual regressions or misalignments
Build release binary and verify packaged app
